OUR HERITAGE

The art of the
pristine
environment.

Founded on the principle that a clean home is the canvas for a well-lived life, Sanctum Clean brings a curated, editorial eye to residential maintenance. We don't just clean, we restore order, light, and tranquility to your sanctuary.

✦

"Absolute luxury starts with a pristine professional clean."

✦

"We leave a user signature, tranquility is our result."

10K+

PRISTINE SPACES CLEANED

Our Mission

THE STANDARD

To provide a concierge-level cleaning experience that prioritizes the health of your family and the longevity of your high-end finishes.

THE VISION

We aim to be the silent architect of your home's serenity, ensuring that every time you walk through your door, the weight of the world lifts.

Reserve our elite workforce →

EXPERTISE

The Curators of Clean

Every member of our staff undergoes rigorous background checks and our signature hotel-level training certification.

Zulem Lopez

Lead Cleaner / 12 Years Experience

Shesly Morales

Specialist / 8 Years Experience

Our Sustainability
Commitment

Luxury should never come at the cost of the environment. We exclusively use biodegradable, non-toxic, and plant-derived cleaning solutions that are as effective as they are gentle on your surfaces and the planet.

FIRST-RATE TOOLS

Safe for luxury soft ranges

ZERO PLASTIC WASTE

Refillable glass systems
